nasb.text: But what is the divine response to him? “I have kept for Myself seven thousand men who have not bowed the knee to Baal.”

esv.text: But what is God’s reply to him? “I have kept for myself seven thousand men who have not bowed the knee to Baal.”

cnv.text: 但　神怎樣回答他呢？“我為自己留下了七千人，是沒有向巴力屈膝的。”

ccb.text: 上帝怎样回答呢？祂说：“我为自己留下七千人，他们未曾跪拜巴力。”

csbs.text: 但神对他的答复是怎么说的呢？“我为自己保留了七千人，他们是没有向巴力屈膝的。”
